shape: triage-surface (no node, no edge — bundle anchor logged for future curation)
description: Curatorial light touch — option (b) per the brief. Smite the Monstrous bridges five hubs in a single composition (eldrazi + body-horror + scale + heroism + mass-combat) and visually argues the whole BFZ block adversary thesis. Considered creating cards/_symbols/eldrazi-resistance.md as a 'small-figures-grappling-titan' symbol but rejected on threshold grounds — Smite is the only single-frame attacking-tableau card in corpus; Fortified Rampart is defenders-behind-wall, not grappling-attackers, so a 2-card symbol-tier threshold is not met. The right move is to surface the card as a future Discrete Lair cover-art anchor in janitor_triage.md so that when the BFZ-Eldrazi-resistance bundle is assembled (anchored on the 9 kor + 3 BFZ Eldrazi roster), the cover-anchor is already identified. New 'Open — bundle-anchor candidates (curatorial spotlight)' section added to janitor_triage.md for the parking-lot use case. Don't over-engineer; the symbol node can be commissioned later if a second similar attacking-tableau card surfaces (e.g. a Stalwart Aven, a Resolute Blademaster, a future OGW kor-attacks-titan card).
citations: Wave 41 vision pass on Smite the Monstrous (bridging-five-hubs surface notation)
